chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 394 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1607/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.03.2025 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State along with SIP Allah Dino >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Asstt:AG and Deputy PG submit that in the case arising out of FIR No.61 of 2024 registered with Police Station, Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur for offence under Section 23(i)A of Sindh Arms Act, 2013, the final challan has been submitted before the Court of law having jurisdiction. After such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will approach the concerned trial Court for his premature acquittal. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
